title: Zwaluw's Artillery
description: Changes the bow to a revolver (and more!)
body:
![Artillery Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e973d8f4be78fa339ee3de4cc681f3ef3bc19549.png) ---
--- Adds some weaponry to the game! This resource pack turns the bow into a revolver. Renaming it allows you to turn it into a list of different guns! --- ![Gif](https://i.postimg.cc/wMQ83LDx/pewers.gif) --- ## Frequently Asked Questions
What guns are available right now? Including the basic revolver, there are 7 guns available. Rename the revolver to one of these names to change it's model; - "Hammer Revolver" (old model) - "Ranger Pistol" (Ranger Pistol from Fortnite Ballistic (o7)) - "Mauser Pistol" (Mauser C96) - "Jolt" (Nerf Jolt blaster) - "Hammershot" (Nerf Hammershot) - "Tactical Shotgun" (Fortnite Tactical Shotgun)
Do I need any mods for it to work? The entire pack works in vanilla, so no mods are required!!
How do I install this pack? I'd recommend following [this](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/how-to-install-minecraft-texture-packs-4615399/) guide on PlanetMinecraft. Enjoy!
I've found a bug or got a suggestion! Hi! Thank you for your contribution, join my Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/fV9aby4XGG) and feel free to show it in #general.
Terms Of Service You're allowed to alter and edit any of the textures as long as you don't distribute it. Keep it to yourself.
---
